testcase.name: Browse and search available skills "before all" hook for "01 View available skills and their owner information prominently"
testcase.classname: "before all" hook for "01 View available skills and their owner information prominently"

failure.message:
`cy.click()` can only be called on a single element. Your subject contained 4 elements. Pass `{ multiple: true }` if you want to serially click each element.
https://on.cypress.io/click
Because this error occurred during a `before all` hook we are skipping the remaining tests in the current suite: `Browse and search available...`

testcase.failure:
CypressError: `cy.click()` can only be called on a single element. Your subject contained 4 elements. Pass `{ multiple: true }` if you want to serially click each element.
https://on.cypress.io/click
Because this error occurred during a `before all` hook we are skipping the remaining tests in the current suite: `Browse and search available...` at mouseAction (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:114755:68) at Context.click (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:114922:14) at wrapped (http://localhost:8081/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:146330:19) From Your Spec Code: at Context.eval (webpack://spring2_test/./cypress/e2e/sprint2/browse_available_skills.cy.js:20:33)
